request.title: ADR-030 real multi-writer handoff test
request.description: First genuine cross-participant test of Mission Ownership Lock (ADR-030 §3.1) and Hop Limit (§3.2). Instructions for Grok: 1) Read this file. 2) Rewrite it with owner changed from 'Claude' to 'Grok' and hop_count incremented from 0 to 1 — this write IS the handoff, do it as an explicit action, not a side effect. 3) Append an audit.history entry for the handoff (event=HANDOFF, actor=Grok). 4) Move the file: write to messages/processing/MIS-20260701-0004.json, delete from messages/queued/. 5) Do the actual work below. 6) Move to messages/completed/, delete from processing/, set owner back to 'Claude', hop_count to 2, append a final HANDOFF audit entry (actor=Grok, detail='returning to Claude').
request.actual_task: Confirm github:delete_file and github:write_file both still work reliably from your side against vlad74ai/ai-transport (per PLATFORM_STATUS.md, this was last confirmed 2026-06-30). Report any errors in the result field.
request.expected_output: Mission reaches messages/completed/ with hop_count=2, owner='Claude', and a real (not synthetic) handoff trail in audit.history — the first genuine multi-writer evidence for ADR-030.

history.detail: Created for Grok pickup. owner intentionally left as Claude (creator) until Grok performs the explicit handoff write per ADR-030 §3.1 — Grok must not skip this step even though it is the addressed executor.
